data.title: Brilliance China Automotive Announces Executive Leadership Change
data.description:
Brilliance China Automotive Holdings ( (HK:1114) ) has shared an announcement.

Brilliance China Automotive Holdings Limited announced a change in its executive leadership with the resignation of Mr. Xu Daqing as an executive director due to retirement, effective March 20, 2025. Mr. Guo Hongbo has been appointed as the new executive director effective March 21, 2025. Mr. Guo brings extensive leadership experience from his previous roles in various energy and investment companies in Liaoning Province, which may influence the company’s strategic direction and operations.

More about Brilliance China Automotive Holdings

Brilliance China Automotive Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda with limited liability, operating in the automotive industry. It focuses on the production and distribution of vehicles and automotive components, serving markets primarily in China.

YTD Price Performance: 1.14%

Average Trading Volume: 9,591

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.76B

data.title: Equinor ASA Reports Strong 2024 Performance Amid Regulatory Challenges
data.description:
An update from Equinor ASA ( (GB:0M2Z) ) is now available.

Equinor ASA reported strong financial and operational performance for 2024, with significant contributions to energy security in Europe and a focus on safety improvements. The company achieved a substantial increase in renewable energy production and made progress in its energy transition goals, including reducing greenhouse gas emissions and advancing carbon capture projects. However, Equinor faced regulatory challenges, receiving a financial penalty from the French Energy Regulatory Commission for past market manipulations, which the company plans to appeal.

More about Equinor ASA

Equinor ASA is a major energy company operating primarily in the oil, gas, and renewable energy sectors. It focuses on producing energy for current needs while developing future energy systems, with significant operations in Europe, particularly Norway, and a growing presence in renewable energy projects.

YTD Price Performance: 4.13%

Average Trading Volume: 653,239

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: NOK720.7B

data.title: Addiko Bank AG Announces Annual General Meeting for April 2025
data.description:
Addiko Bank AG ( (ADBKF) ) has issued an update.

Addiko Bank AG has announced the convocation of its Annual General Meeting scheduled for April 18, 2025, in Vienna. The meeting will cover several key agenda items, including the presentation of financial statements, resolutions on the discharge of board members, election of auditors, and decisions on remuneration policies. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it will address critical governance and financial matters impacting the bank’s operations and strategic direction.

More about Addiko Bank AG

Addiko Bank AG is a financial institution based in Vienna, Austria, and is listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange. The bank primarily focuses on providing banking services and products, including financial statements and governance reports, to its shareholders and stakeholders.

data.title: Flexiroam Limited Relocates Principal Office to Malaysia
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Flexiroam Ltd ( (AU:FRX) ).

Flexiroam Limited has announced a change in its principal place of business to a new location in Petaling Jaya, Malaysia. This move could potentially enhance the company’s operational efficiency and strengthen its market presence in the region, aligning with its mission to provide seamless global connectivity solutions.

More about Flexiroam Ltd

Flexiroam Limited (ASX: FRX) is a company that provides connectivity solutions for the travel industry, offering seamless data services at competitive rates. The company operates a versatile network with 520 network operators across over 200 countries, catering to both consumers and businesses worldwide. Flexiroam is committed to enhancing global connectivity to facilitate flexible and spontaneous travel experiences.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: China Mobile Reports Growth in Revenue and Digital Transformation for 2024
data.description:
China Mobile ( (HK:0941) ) has provided an announcement.

China Mobile Limited reported a 3.1% increase in operating revenue for 2024, reaching RMB1,040.8 billion, with telecommunications services revenue up by 3.0%. The company saw significant growth in digital transformation revenue, which rose by 9.9% and now constitutes 31.3% of its telecommunications services revenue. The company continues to expand its customer base, with 1,004 million mobile customers and 315 million wireline broadband customers. China Mobile is advancing its strategic initiatives to strengthen its position as a world-class information services and sci-tech innovation enterprise, focusing on new quality productive forces in the information services industry.

More about China Mobile

China Mobile Limited is a major player in the telecommunications industry, offering a range of services including mobile and wireline broadband. The company is focused on digital transformation and innovation, leveraging technologies such as 5G and AI to enhance its service offerings and market position.

Average Trading Volume: 4,363

data.title: Commonwealth Bank of Australia Announces New Dividend Distribution
data.description:
Commonwealth Bank of Australia ( (AU:CBA) ) has issued an update.

The Commonwealth Bank of Australia announced a new dividend distribution for its security, CAP NOTE 3-BBSW+3.00% PERP NON-CUM RED T-06-30, with a distribution amount of AUD 1.2551. The payment is scheduled for June 16, 2025, with a record date of June 6, 2025, and an ex-date of June 5, 2025. This announcement reflects the bank’s ongoing commitment to providing returns to its investors and may impact its financial performance and investor relations positively.

More about Commonwealth Bank of Australia

data.title: Iberdrola Secures UK Approval for Strategic Acquisition
data.description:
Iberdrola ( (ES:IBE) ) has provided an announcement.

Iberdrola has received unconditional authorization from the UK’s Competition and Markets Authority for its acquisition of an 88% stake in Electricity North West Limited. This move aligns with Iberdrola’s 2024-2026 Strategic Plan, enhancing its position in the UK energy transmission and distribution market.

More about Iberdrola

Iberdrola, S.A. is a leading global energy company primarily engaged in the production, distribution, and commercialization of electricity. The company focuses on renewable energy sources and is a significant player in the energy transmission and distribution market, particularly in Europe and the Americas.

data.title: Great Southern Copper PLC Announces New Share Admission on London Stock Exchange
data.description:
An update from Great Southern Copper PLC ( (GB:GSCU) ) is now available.

Great Southern Copper PLC has announced the admission of 208,333 new ordinary shares to trading on the London Stock Exchange, effective from 8.00 am on March 20, 2025. This development increases the total number of issued shares and voting rights to 550,852,323, impacting shareholder calculations under the Financial Conduct Authority’s rules.

More about Great Southern Copper PLC

Great Southern Copper PLC is a UK-listed mineral exploration company focused on discovering copper-gold-silver deposits in Chile. The company has options to acquire rights to two projects in Chile’s coastal belt, which is known for significant copper mines and deposits. The company is strategically positioned to support the global copper market, a critical metal for the clean energy transition.

data.title: Standard Chartered Executes Share Buy-back to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) has shared an announcement.

Standard Chartered PLC has executed a share buy-back program, purchasing 1,150,000 of its ordinary shares at prices ranging from 1,183.5 to 1,199.0 GB pence. The company plans to cancel these shares, reducing the total number of shares in issue to 2,395,673,854, which will also be the total number of voting rights. This move is part of a strategic effort to manage the company’s share capital and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a multinational banking and financial services company headquartered in London, England. It operates primarily in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East, providing a range of services including personal banking, corporate banking, and wealth management.
